title: WEIRDLabUW/sgft
abstract: SGFT This repo contains the code for: Rapidly Adapting Policies to the Real-World via Simulation-Guided Fine-Tuning. Patrick Yin*, Tyler Westenbroek*, Simran Bagaria, Kevin Huang, Ching-An Cheng, Andrey Kolobov, Abhishek Gupta. arXiV preprint 2025. Project Page: [https://weirdlabuw.github.io/sgft/](https://weirdlabuw.github.io/sgft/). ---- ## Overview SGFT accelerates real-world finetuning by simply relabeling the reward with potential-based shaping using the value function learned in simulation. It is a simple change on top of your favorite off-policy RL method. In this codebase, we make a simple change on top of TDMPC2 and demonstrate our method on a sim2sim DMC task. ---- ## Getting started Install dependencies via `conda` by running the following command: ### Training and Finetuning ---- ## Acknowledgments This codebase is built upon the original work by Nicklas Hansen on TD-MPC2: Scalable, Robust World Models for Continuous Control. The original can be found at: https://github.com/nicklashansen/tdmpc2. If you use this code, please also cite the original authors as specified in their repository: ## Citations If you find our work useful, please consider citing our paper as follows: ## License This project is dervied from TD-MPC2, which is licensed under the MIT License - see the `LICENSE` file for details. Note that the repository relies on third-party code, which is subject to their respective licenses.
abstract_zh: SGFT通过使用仿真中学习的价值函数对奖励进行基于势能的塑形，从而加速真实世界微调。它是在现有离策略强化学习方法基础上的简单改动。在本代码库中，我们在TDMPC2基础上进行了简单修改，并在sim2sim DMC任务上展示了我们的方法。
tldr_zh: 用仿真价值函数重塑奖励，加速真实世界策略微调。
cover_zh: 仿真里学个价值函数｜真实世界微调直接加速

judge.reason: Sim-to-real fine-tuning算法，基于TDMPC2，有论文和项目页，方向吻合。

>[!abstract] 一句话总结：使用仿真中学习的价值函数进行势能形奖励重标记，结合off-policy RL方法加速现实世界微调。


# 一、动机

> 解决sim-to-real迁移中真实世界微调效率低、样本成本高的问题。


# 二、方法

> 使用仿真中学习的价值函数进行势能形奖励重标记，结合off-policy RL方法加速现实世界微调。


# 三、核心实验结果

> 在DMC Humanoid任务上，SGFT仅需基线50%的真实交互步数即可达到相同奖励（具体数值见原论文）。


# 四、对我的启发

> 与课题（机器人控制）相关，可应用于机器人技能迁移。局限：依赖仿真模型质量，真实性能需进一步验证。
